meta.note: Sample data — set FINNHUB_API_KEY for live quotes.

news.headline: Netflix tops subscriber and revenue estimates; raises full-year guidance
news.summary: Strong net adds and ad-tier momentum drove a beat. Shares jumped in the after-hours session; IV likely to compress tomorrow.

news.headline: NVIDIA guides next-quarter revenue above Street on sovereign-AI demand
news.summary: Management cited accelerating data-center orders and called supply 'fully allocated' through next year. Several desks raised estimates.

news.headline: Tesla deliveries miss as China demand softens; price cuts deepen
news.summary: Q deliveries came in below consensus and margin pressure is expected to persist. Two firms trimmed targets overnight.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 hits primary endpoint in late-stage trial
news.summary: Phase 3 obesity data beat expectations on weight-loss magnitude with a clean safety profile ahead of tomorrow's earnings.

news.headline: Fed minutes signal patience; officials want 'more good data' before cuts
news.summary: Minutes leaned slightly hawkish but markets still price the next move as a cut. Yields ticked higher across the curve.

news.headline: Boeing faces fresh FAA scrutiny over production line inspections
news.summary: Regulators opened a review of fuselage assembly quality. Headline risk elevated into the cash session.

news.headline: Crypto rallies overnight; Bitcoin reclaims key level as ETF inflows resume
news.summary: Risk appetite in digital assets lifted exchange and miner names in premarket. Call flow heavy in COIN.

news.headline: Super Micro slips after short-seller questions accounting disclosures
news.summary: A new report raised flags on revenue recognition. Shares indicated lower with elevated put activity.

news.headline: Palantir lands expanded government AI contract worth up to $480M
news.summary: Multi-year award expands the company's defense footprint and supports the bull narrative on commercial AI traction.

sentiment.label: bullish
sentiment.summary: Composite sentiment +45 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, spy trend. VIX at 13.52 (-3.7%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $521.80 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $596.40 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $521.80 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: LLY CALL — enter $26.09–$28.83, target $41.19+, stop $16.48.
Earnings risk: NFLX (AMC), LLY (BMO) — avoid holding short premium through the print.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +0.75% and QQQ +1.05%. Composite sentiment +45 (Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, spy trend. VIX at 13.52 (-3.7%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Leadership came from Healthcare; Industrials lagged. Today's standouts: NVDA +2.65%, META +2.45%. Laggards: SMCI -2.68%, BA -1.74%. Carrying LLY as the top idea into tomorrow (7.9/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
